description: A landlord wants to set up an agreement where the utility service for a rental property automatically reverts to their name when a tenant moves out.

nodes.task_description: Identify the landlord's account and the specific rental property address.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the relevant account and service address.

nodes.task_description: Explain the terms of the automatic reversion agreement.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates how the process works.

nodes.task_description: Process the agreement form and link the landlord's account to the service address.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sets up the reversion agreement in the system.
